US.TradeMerchTotal.title: Merchandise: Total trade and share, annual

EXPORTS.label: Exports
EXPORTS.description: Goods exports in current USD, excluding services.

IMPORTS.label: Imports
IMPORTS.description: Goods imports in current USD, excluding services.

TRADE_BALANCE.label: Trade Balance
TRADE_BALANCE.description: Goods trade balance in current USD, calculated as goods exports minus goods imports. Services are excluded.

IMPORTS.indicator: Imports, US$ at current prices in millions
